name: ZION OIL & GAS INC
summary: Zion Oil and Gas, Inc. is a Delaware (re-domesticating to Texas) oil and gas exploration company with 25 years of exploration history in Israel. The company holds Exploration License 434 (NMVL 434) covering approximately 75,000 acres in Israel and operates its own drilling rig through subsidiaries Zion Drilling, Inc. and Zion Drilling Services, Inc. Current operations focus on the Megiddo-Jezreel wellfield (MJ-01 and MJ-02), where gas has been observed at surface during flowback operations.

products.name: Oil and Gas Exploration Services
products.description: Onshore oil and gas exploration in Israel under Exploration License 434 covering ~75,000 acres.

products.name: Contract Drilling Services
products.description: Zion Drilling Services provides drilling rig services to third-party operators in Israel at market rates.
